arms_mandatory_baselines: shuffled-kernel-verify-retry (oracle-STRUCTURE null — identical retry topology, record content decoupled from items by a seed-pinned derangement; LOAD-BEARING and the one cost NOT to cut)
gold-oracle-retry (diagnostic retry ceiling; NON-DEPLOYABLE — reads the answer key; reported, never part of any PASS)

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness on the FRESH kernel-covered d-qa-r slice (pinned item order; non-LLM rubric)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness on the externally-authored d-ext slice run through each arm's OWN pipeline (the F2 ext_vector defect is closed). DESCRIPTIVE ONLY — no endpoint: d-ext items are not kernel-checkable, so the verifier abstains off-coverage there by construction; transfer is the gated f2b-TRANSFER experiment
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_external

dependent_vars.definition: fresh kernel-covered-slice accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component); store = unique canonical record bytes (fixes F2's per-item double count)
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3 — verifier CPU work metered at the pinned rate (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

dependent_vars.definition: training FLOPs / steps / tokens-to-target (V component; 0 — inference-only)
dependent_vars.name: training_compute

assumptions.claim: oracle-leakage rationale: the F2 signal is suspected to be an artifact because check() accepts iff the answer string-equals the canonical record and D-QA gold was defined by that same equality; this experiment is built to separate REAL from NOT-LEAKY, not to presume either

d-qa-r freshness: full-prompt-surface disjointness from all 650 d-qa items enforced fail-closed at build (LC8; 191 candidate retries, 39 claim-true->claim-false substitutions recorded in data/d-qa-r/leak-check.json). CAVEAT disclosed: the 108 covered concepts and fixed question templates are shared with d-qa by construction — kernel coverage is fixed; freshness lives in distractor sets, donor claims, segment choices, option orders and ranks

d-qa-r answer-key distribution: 244 def-match + 216 term-match (A-D balanced, LC7) + 177 yes / 363 no on claim items (claim-false-heavy after freshness substitutions); the shared IF-C affordance scores every option, and the verifier accepts iff consistent for both polarities

d-ext items are not kernel-checkable (kernel_checkable = false for all 500, by construction of the R-C coverage filter), so the fixed external pipeline measures off-coverage ABSTENTION behaviour of each arm — an instrument-honesty fix, not a transfer measurement; RT-7a transfer needs kernel-covered external items (f2b-TRANSFER, gated)

greedy attempt-0 decode + fixed resample seeds make the pipeline deterministic given the pinned models; a same-items rerun of the logged F2 500 would have zero evidential value — the fresh item set is the entire point of this experiment

coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice
planning constants (throughput tok/s, chars/token, 2x overhead) are dry-plan ESTIMATES only and are never emitted as measurements

supersedes-in-spirit: this record registers the G-13 promotion path for the quarantined (R1,R3) exploratory estimand of poc/f2/f2b-reanalysis.md; NOTHING here amends f2 — the frozen F2 record, its FAIL verdict and its confirmatory secondaries stand exactly as issued

n_planned.dropped_arms: R2, all cascades (HE2 failed confirmatory in F2; not re-litigated without a design change), int4, RAG, self-consistency — advisor design; their F2 confirmatory readings stand
n_planned.fresh_items: data/d-qa-r (built 2026-07-09, generator seed dqar/1|f2b-replicate|20260709): 1000 items over the 108 covered concepts; ID-disjoint (dqar: namespace) AND full-prompt-surface-disjoint from all 650 logged d-qa items (leak rule LC8, fail-closed); NOT a rerun of the logged 500 — deterministic decode would reproduce them
n_planned.holm_family: ONE family F-secondary(f2b), membership pre-declared: beats_text_null, beats_gloss_self_verify, prm_beaten, shuffled_low_recovery, plus (conditional on the separation gate) gap_r1r3_gt_half and gap_r1r3_gt_one; gold-oracle gap is DIAGNOSTIC (reported with CI, never Holm-tested, never verdict-bearing)
n_planned.iface_gate: P10: >=300 labelled outputs at the verifier host rung (R1), re-verified mechanically from the pinned d-xif labelled set through THIS harness's extraction machinery; extraction-failure Wilson-LB > 10% => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (instrument events, never hypothesis events)
n_planned.power: n=1000 fresh items, 5 seeds: the F2 logged effect (verify 0.635 vs R3-alone 0.536, exploratory) is h~0.2; one-sided paired test power >0.99 at h=0.2 with n=1000 (P8 §1.6 n≈271 suffices at 0.90); the doubled n targets the denominator-noise-bound ratio secondaries
n_planned.separation_gate: instrument gate, pre-declared: acc(R3-alone) - acc(R1-alone) >= 0.10 (5-seed mean) AND one-sided 95% BCa lower bound of the difference > 0; on failure the RATIO secondaries (gap_r1r3_gt_half, gap_r1r3_gt_one) are INSTRUMENT-INVALID and leave the Holm family BEFORE any p-value comparison (the gate is a deterministic function of the alone arms only); the ABSOLUTE primary still reads

endpoints.test: ABSOLUTE non-inferiority at margin 0 (NO denominator — fixes the degenerate-ratio failure that killed the F2 primary): effect_size = acc(135M + kernel-verify-retry, best k in {1,2,4} reselected inside EVERY resample) - acc(1.7B-alone); paired item BCa bootstrap (B=10000, PRNG seed 20260709), one-sided alpha=0.05; reject iff the one-sided 95% BCa lower bound >= 0. Accuracies are seed-averaged per-item means on the fresh kernel-covered d-qa-r slice (P8 §1.2/§1.7 discipline)

INSTRUMENT gate, pre-declared (not a hypothesis test, not a Holm member): acc(R3-alone) - acc(R1-alone) >= 0.10 (5-seed mean) AND one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0; on failure the ratio secondaries are INSTRUMENT-INVALID (the absolute primary still reads)

gap_closed(R1,R3) one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 1.0 ('the 135M+verifier does not just close the gap, it overshoots it'); best-k in-resample; Holm within F-secondary(f2b); CONDITIONAL on the separation gate (else INSTRUMENT-INVALID, excluded from the family before any p comparison)
gap_closed(R1,R3) one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0.5 (the F2 kill-bar analogue on the fresh pairing); same machinery and conditionality as sec-gap-r1r3-gt-one

one-sided paired bootstrap vs gloss-text self-verify+retry at matched budget, BOTH arms' best-k reselected in-resample (RT-2: the kernel arm cannot PASS without beating this); Holm within F-secondary(f2b) at alpha=0.05
HC3: kernel verifier vs trained-PRM arm at matched FLOPs (F0 ledger), one-sided paired bootstrap; Holm within F-secondary(f2b); PRM-parity as a positive claim requires TOST at margin h=0.2
one-sided paired bootstrap vs the kernel-as-text arm (Law-2 passive text null); Holm within F-secondary(f2b)

E9-defl semantics-control analogue, THE load-bearing new secondary: recovery = (acc(shuffled-verify, best k) - acc(R1-alone)) / (acc(kernel-verify, best k) - acc(R1-alone)), each best-k reselected in-resample; passes iff the one-sided 95% BCa upper bound of recovery < 0.30; Holm within F-secondary(f2b). The KILL (clause b) fires on the POINT estimate >= 0.30 regardless of this test

DIAGNOSTIC, reported not killed, NEVER verdict-bearing: acc(gold-oracle-retry, best k) - acc(kernel-verify, best k) with 95% percentile CI — the retry topology's ceiling; the gold-oracle arm reads the answer key and is NON-DEPLOYABLE
C-4 robustness gate: >=4/5 sampling seeds same-direction verifier lift over R1-alone (pre-declared secondary, not a test)

P10 extraction-failure instrument gate at the verifier host rung (R1), success-direction rendering: extraction-success Wilson-LB must clear 0.90 at n>=300 labelled outputs (equivalently failure Wilson-LB <= 0.10); measured by mechanical re-verification of the pinned d-xif set

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Advisor scope, binding on any PASS: 2 host rungs (135M, 1.7B) license a SIGN, not a slope; every claim is scoped to <=1.7B hosts, the kernel-covered SELF-AUTHORED item slice (templated definitional QA over the 108 covered concepts), this PRM size class (1.5B, pinned revision), and an oracle-favourable eval design; the s->S gap itself narrows as S grows, so absolute verifier catch-room shrinks with scale. Coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0 — MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage. Inherited P1 §4b HE1 anchors: cascade/verification-routing literature licenses mechanism existence above 7B, never effect size; the HC3 verdict is indexed to the PRM size class tested and a frontier-scale PRM re-opens the fork.
hypotheses: HE1 (fresh-item replication, absolute non-inferiority form: the frozen F2 gap_closed primary died on a degenerate denominator; this primary has no denominator)

H-STRUCT (new, load-bearing): the F2 verifier lift is kernel-CONTENT-specific, not retry-against-any-oracle STRUCTURE — operationalised by the shuffled-kernel-verify-retry arm (seed-pinned derangement of the record->concept map at identical retry topology and cost); motivated by the oracle-leakage hypothesis: the verifier accepts iff the answer string-equals the canonical record, and D-QA gold answers were DEFINED by that same equality (explains F2's 272/500-up, 0-down flip profile)
HC3 (kernel verifier vs trained PRM at matched FLOPs, this PRM size class)
RT-2 (kernel verifier vs gloss-text self-verify + retry at matched budget)
kill_criterion_verbatim: Architecture-advisor frozen design for f2b-REPLICATE (verbatim kills): (a) primary fails => the headline is dead on fresh items; (b) SHUFFLED-verify recovers >= 30% of true-verify's lift-over-alone (point estimate) => the lift is retry-against-any-oracle STRUCTURE not kernel CONTENT, and the kernel-specific claim DIES even at high accuracy; (c) gloss-self-verify or the trained PRM closes as much lift at <= matched FLOPs/query (F0 ledger, point estimates) => Law-2 / commodity-verification kill. Nulls require TOST (equivalence to R3-alone at margin h=0.2). Inherited context (P1 §3 HE1 + P7 RT-2): the kernel arm cannot PASS without beating the gloss-text self-verify+retry arm at matched budget and the passive text null. The gold-oracle-retry arm is a DIAGNOSTIC CEILING outside every kill and every PASS condition: it reads the answer key and is non-deployable by construction.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

model_revisions._note: pinned DIRECTLY at freeze (no PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder): all revisions were already resolved by F2 ops amendments 2-3 and the backends are built + Modal-smoked

runner_constraints.hardware: modal cloud GPU; image + GPU class pinned inside the harness_manifest staged bytes (requirements-image.txt is in the hashed set; I-MODAL rebuild from it)
runner_constraints.harness: poc/f2b (own runner + inputs + modal wrapper; poc/f2 is left byte-identical to its F2 amendment-6 pin); pins.harness_manifest is the staged-bytes manifest sha printed by poc/modal/modal_f2b.py — pinned DIRECTLY in this record, so ANY staged-byte change after freeze requires a correction record before any final-phase run

title: f2b-replicate — fresh-item replication of the F2 verifier-offload signal with oracle-structure controls: absolute non-inferiority primary (135M + kernel-verify vs 1.7B-alone, NO gap denominator), shuffled-record verifier null (load-bearing), gold-oracle diagnostic ceiling, separation gate, fixed external-slice instrument; architecture-advisor frozen design implemented faithfully; supersedes-in-spirit f2 (the F2 FAIL verdict stands untouched)
